name: Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Heat the milk and pour over the bread cubes.
3. Beat the eggs with the brown sugar and melted butter in a separate bowl.
4. Add the egg mixture to the milk and bread cubes, stirring to combine.
5. Stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Turn off the oven and let it cool in the closed door for 10 minutes before serving.
